criteria.description: resolve_precondition_ref unit tests + TestResolvePlanningArtifactStaging partition tests classify each path per kind (PRIMARY->HEAD, COORD-residue->coord ref).

Integration repro TestSoloPrBoundCoordMissionClaimPrecondition: solo PR-bound coord mission with spec/plan/tasks/meta committed on feature branch -> claim proceeds, no 'Planning artifacts not committed', topology unchanged.

test_dirty_primary_lands_on_target_dirty_coord_lands_on_coord: genuinely-dirty PRIMARY spec.md on a coord mission commits to the primary/target ref; dirty COORD status file -> coord ref (two-transaction partition).
Red-first verified by reviewer: reverting implement_cores.py to base makes the integration repro fail via the real _ensure_planning_artifacts_committed_git gate (typer.Exit(1)); passes after fix.
test_tasks_move_task_partition.py exercises the real _mt_untracked_planning_artifact_paths consumer: committed PRIMARY artifacts not flagged; dirty COORD kind still surfaced (silent-consumer guard).
branch-target-routing.md and execution-lanes.md corrected to the kind-based partition (ADR 2026-06-24-1); no residual single-ref claim; terminology guard green.
